papers.title_en: Knowledge enhancement with cross-modal fusion network for radiological report generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科医生工作负担重及现有自动报告生成模型缺乏领域知识的问题，提出了一种基于知识增强的跨模态融合网络。该方法通过深度整合医学影像的视觉特征与结构化的医学领域知识，有效解决了传统模型在理解复杂医学图像时的局限性。实验表明，该模型能生成更具专业性和准确性的放射学报告，显著提升了自动化诊断的质量，为临床医疗决策提供了有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Automated medical report generation has important application value in clinicalmedicine, because it can reduce the burden on radiologists. The current research onautomatic medical report generation has some problems, such as lack of domain …

papers.title_en: Advancing federated semi-supervised medical image segmentation: A duo of interactive denoising pseudo-labels and convolutional contrastive learning
papers.tldr: 针对联邦学习中医疗图像标注成本高、专家稀缺导致的标注数据不足问题，本文提出一种联邦半监督医学图像分割框架。该方法结合了交互式去噪伪标签技术与卷积对比学习，旨在充分利用各参与方的无标注数据。通过这种双重机制，模型在保护隐私的同时显著提升了分割性能，为解决医疗领域标注匮乏下的联邦学习难题提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Many existing studies on federated learning (FL) for segmentation primarily assumethat all client data are labeled. However, in reality, due to the high cost of hospitalconstruction and the scarcity of expert annotators, many medical sites can only …

papers.title_en: Multimodal Learning with Privileged Report Supervision for Generalizable Tuberculosis Detection on Chest Radiographs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线结核病检测，提出了一种利用特权报告监督的多模态学习框架。针对合成报告易导致幻觉及传统多模态系统在推理时依赖文本的局限性，该方法在训练阶段引入临床报告作为辅助语义监督，显著提升了模型在不同数据集上的泛化能力，为医疗AI提供了一种更实用且鲁棒的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal learning using images and associated clinical text offers richer semanticsupervision for medical AI. However, models trained with synthetic reports riskhallucination, and conventional multimodal tuberculosis (TB) systems are impractical …

papers.title_en: Revisiting long-range dependency modeling in CNNs for medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了如何在卷积神经网络（CNN）中高效建模长程依赖关系，以应对医学图像分割中解剖结构精确勾画的挑战。针对CNN在捕捉全局上下文方面的局限性，论文提出了一种改进的CNN架构，旨在达到与Transformer相当的长程建模能力。实验证明，该方法在保持CNN计算效率的同时，显著提升了医学图像分割的准确性，为该领域提供了新的模型设计思路。
papers.abstract_en: How can convolutional neural networks (CNNs) model long-range dependencies asefficiently as Transformers? This remains a critical challenge in computer vision,particularly in medical image segmentation where accurate delineation of anatomical …

papers.title_en: A Prompt-Guided Vision-Language Framework for Interpretable and Region-Aware Disease Diagnosis in Chest X-rays
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了一种提示引导的视觉-语言框架，旨在解决胸部X射线诊断中视觉分析、推理与报告生成相互孤立的问题。该框架通过整合这些步骤，实现了具有可解释性和区域感知能力的疾病诊断，显著提升了AI在医学影像分析中的临床实用性与透明度。
papers.abstract_en: Effective interpretation of chest X-rays requires a tightly integrated process of visualanalysis, diagnostic reasoning, and structured reporting. Yet, most machine learningsystems handle these steps in isolation. Visual encoders are typically trained without …

papers.title_en: OpenMedQ: Broad Open Pretraining for Medical Vision-Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究推出了OpenMedQ，这是一个在迄今为止最广泛的完全开放医学数据集上预训练的视觉语言模型。该模型整合了14个开源数据集，包含约335万个样本，涵盖了病理学、放射学、显微镜学及纯文本临床问答等多个领域。通过这种大规模、多模态的开放预训练，OpenMedQ为医疗AI提供了一个高性能且通用的开源基准，显著提升了模型在多样化医疗场景下的理解能力。
papers.abstract_en: We present OpenMedQ, a medical vision-language model pretrained on thebroadest fully-open medical mix to date: 14 datasets totaling∼ 3.35 M pretrainingsamples spanning pathology, radiology, microscopy, and text-only clinical QA …

papers.title_en: Medical Multimodal Large Language Models: A Survey
papers.tldr: 本文全面综述了医疗多模态大语言模型（Medical MLLMs）的发展现状。随着通用多模态模型的兴起，通过整合临床报告、医学影像及生理信号等数据，医疗专用模型应运而生。文章系统梳理了该领域的模型架构、训练策略及应用场景，探讨了其在提升医疗诊断效率方面的潜力，并指出了当前面临的挑战与未来研究方向。
papers.abstract_en: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have gradually givenrise to medical multimodal large language models (Medical MLLMs) through theintegration of multimodal data such as clinical reports, medical images, physiological …

papers.title_en: PeFoMed: Parameter efficient fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for medical CXR
papers.tldr: 本研究提出PeFoMed框架，旨在通过参数高效微调（PEFT）技术将多模态大语言模型（MLLM）应用于医疗胸部X光（CXR）分析。针对医疗领域微调成本高、数据敏感等挑战，PeFoMed在保持模型性能的同时显著减少了可训练参数量，实现了高效的医学影像理解与报告生成，为大模型在医疗垂直领域的应用提供了轻量化方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) represent an evolutionary expansion inthe capabilities of traditional large language models, enabling them to tacklechallenges that surpass the scope of purely text-based applications. Recent works …

papers.title_en: Robust multiparametric model selection for semi‑supervised event‑free survival prediction in lung cancer using PET/CT radiomics
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺癌个性化治疗需求，提出了一种基于PET/CT影像组学的稳健多参数模型选择框架，旨在实现半监督下的无事件生存期（EFS）预测。通过结合机器学习与多维参数优化，该方法解决了传统模型在处理有限标注数据时的不稳定性问题。研究结果证明了该框架在提升预测准确性与模型稳健性方面的有效性，为肺癌预后评估提供了可靠的辅助决策工具。
papers.abstract_en: Robust model selection is essential for improved lung cancer outcome predictiontowards personalized treatments. Machine learning (ML) combined with PET/CTradiomics provides a powerful framework for predictive modeling. However …

papers.title_en: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散多模态大语言模型（dLLMs）在视觉定位推理中的不足，提出了“Thinking Diffusion”框架。该方法通过在扩散过程中引入惩罚与引导机制，优化了模型对视觉信息的理解与逻辑推理能力。作为自回归模型的有力竞争者，该研究通过创新的引导策略显著提升了扩散模型在复杂多模态任务中的表现，为多模态推理提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives toautoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodaltasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models …

papers.title_en: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
papers.tldr: 多模态大语言模型常因注意力过度集中于视觉显著或高频内容而产生幻觉。本文提出一种“公平注意力”机制，通过优化解码过程中的注意力分配，增强模型对视觉输入的定位能力。该方法有效缓解了视觉与语言对齐中的偏差，显著降低了幻觉发生率，提升了生成内容的真实性与可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that areabsent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding isdisproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We …

papers.title_en: A Mechanistic Analysis of Looped Reasoning Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究对通过在潜空间循环层结构来提升推理能力的“循环推理语言模型”进行了深入的机理分析。文章探讨了这种循环机制如何影响模型的内部表示和推理过程，揭示了其在处理复杂逻辑任务时的动态演化规律。该研究通过实验分析，为理解循环架构如何增强大模型推理性能提供了重要的理论依据和实证支持。
papers.abstract_en: Reasoning has become a central capability in large language models. Recentresearch has shown that reasoning performance can be improved by looping anLLM's layers in the latent dimension, resulting in looped reasoning language models …

papers.title_en: CLIP Architecture for Abdominal CT Image-Text Alignment and Zero-Shot Learning: Investigating Batch Composition and Data Scaling
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了CLIP架构在3D腹部CT图像与文本报告对齐中的应用，重点研究了训练批次组成（Batch Composition）和数据规模对零样本诊断性能的影响。通过在3D医疗数据上进行对比学习，揭示了表征学习的优化路径，为提升医疗视觉语言模型的泛化能力提供了重要见解。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models trained with contrastive learning on paired medical imagesand reports show strong zero-shot diagnostic capabilities, yet the effect of trainingbatch composition on learned representations remains unexplored for 3D medical …

papers.title_en: PBSBench: A Multi-Level Vision-Language Framework and Benchmark for Hematopathology Whole Slide Image Interpretation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对外周血涂片（PBS）全切片图像（WSI）解释，提出了PBSBench多级视觉语言框架和基准。不同于侧重组织结构的实体病理，PBS诊断高度依赖于对海量个体细胞形态的精准识别。该框架通过整合细胞级与切片级任务，为血液病理学的自动化分析提供了标准化的评估体系和数据集，显著推动了该领域的视觉语言模型研究。
papers.abstract_en: Peripheral Blood Smear (PBS) is a critical microscopic examination inhematopathology that yields whole-slide imaging (WSI). Unlike solid tissuepathology, PBS interpretation focuses on individual cell morphologies rather than …

papers.title_en: WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models
papers.tldr: 随着大语言模型演进为端到端Web编程智能体，现有基准测试仅关注文本生成和静态指标，难以全面评估其能力。本文提出WebCompass，一个针对代码大模型的多模态Web编程评估基准。该基准通过引入多模态输入和动态交互评估，填补了现有测试在复杂网页开发场景下的空白，为衡量智能体在真实Web环境中的表现提供了更全面的工具。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capableof end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices ofthis capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics …

papers.title_en: Medical Image Understanding Improves Survival Prediction via Visual Instruction Tuning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床决策中生存预测和风险评估的准确性需求，提出了一种基于视觉指令微调（Visual Instruction Tuning）的医疗图像理解方法。通过对CT扫描图像进行深度语义理解，该方法能够比传统放射学特征更有效地捕捉疾病严重程度。研究证明，将大语言模型的指令微调技术应用于医学影像，能显著提升生存预测的精度，为临床管理优化提供了新工具。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate prognostication and risk estimation are essential for guiding clinicaldecision-making and optimizing patient management. While radiologist-assessedfeatures from CT scans provide valuable indicators of disease severity and …

papers.title_en: ProtoCLIP: Prototype-Aligned Latent Refinement for Robust Zero-Shot Chest X-Ray Classification
papers.tldr: 本文提出ProtoCLIP，旨在解决零样本视觉语言模型在胸部X射线分类中遇到的标签共存、长尾类别不平衡及领域偏移导致的不稳定性问题。该方法通过原型对齐的潜在细化技术，在无需额外标注的情况下提升了模型在复杂医学影像任务中的鲁棒性与泛化性能，为稳健的零样本医学诊断提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Zero-shot vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promise for chest radiographclassification, but their performance is often limited by confounding label co-occurrence, long-tail class imbalance, and transfer instability under domain shift. We …

papers.title_en: Toward Clinically Acceptable Chest X-ray Report Generation: A Qualitative Retrospective Pilot Study of CXRMate-2
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线报告生成模型临床实用性不明的问题，提出了CXRMate-2模型。通过放射科医生的定性回顾性试点研究，评估了该模型生成报告的临床可接受性。研究不仅展示了模型在技术指标上的领先地位，更强调了专业医生评估在验证AI医疗工具中的核心作用，为实现临床可用的自动化报告生成奠定了基础。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-ray (CXR) radiology report generation (RRG) models have shown rapidprogress, yet their clinical utility remains uncertain due to limited evaluation byradiologists. We present CXRMate-2, a state-of-the-art CXR RRG model that …

papers.title_en: Can Continual Pre-training Bridge the Performance Gap between General-purpose and Specialized Language Models in the Medical Domain?
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了如何通过持续预训练和模型合并技术，缩小小型专业化模型与大型通用模型在医疗领域的性能差距。针对非英语专业数据稀缺的问题，论文提出了一种领域自适应方法，证明了通过针对性的数据增强和模型优化，可以在参数量较小的情况下实现与大模型相当的专业领域表现。
papers.abstract_en: This paper narrows the performance gap between small, specialized models andsignificantly larger general-purpose models through domain adaptation via continualpre-training and merging. We address the scarcity of specialized non-English data by …

papers.title_en: Pause or Fabricate? Training Language Models for Grounded Reasoning
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在输入信息不完整时容易产生虚假信息（幻觉）并给出不可靠结论的问题，本文研究了如何训练模型进行“有据推理”。作者提出了一种训练方法，使模型在面对缺失信息时能够识别局限性而非盲目捏造，从而提升了复杂推理任务的可靠性，为构建更诚实、稳健的推理系统提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models have achieved remarkable progress on complex reasoningtasks. However, they often implicitly fabricate information when inputs areincomplete, producing confident but unreliable conclusions--a failure mode we term …

papers.title_en: VLA Foundry: A Unified Framework for Training Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.tldr: 本研究推出了 VLA Foundry，这是一个开源的统一框架，旨在解决现有 VLA 模型训练中 LLM、VLM 和动作训练阶段相互割裂、流程不兼容的问题。该框架将三者整合在单一代码库中，为机器人基础模型的端到端开发提供了标准化的工具链，显著降低了构建高性能视觉-语言-动作模型的门槛。
papers.abstract_en: We present VLA Foundry, an open-source framework that unifies LLM, VLM, andVLA training in a single codebase. Most open-source VLA efforts specialize on theaction training stage, often stitching together incompatible pretraining pipelines. VLA …
